sentences.target: Meine Großeltern wohnen in der Nähe.

translations.de: Meine Großeltern wohnen in der Nähe.
translations.it: I miei nonni vivono qui vicino.
translations.yue: 我阿嫲同阿爺住喺附近。
translations.ru: Мои бабушка и дедушка живут рядом.
translations.vi: Ông bà tôi sống gần đây.
translations.uk: Мої дідусь і бабуся живуть поруч.
translations.hi: मेरे दादा-दादी पास में रहते हैं.
translations.id: Kakek dan nenek saya tinggal dekat sini.
translations.sv: Mina mor- och farföräldrar bor i närheten.
translations.ja: 祖父母は近くに住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Großeltern'; agrees in case/number (nominative plural here); marks ownership by 1st person singular.
Plural common noun; subject of the clause; nominative plural.
Main verb; finite present, 3rd person plural agreeing with 'Großeltern'; denotes residence; takes a locative PP.
Preposition selecting dative for static location; introduces the PP 'in der Nähe'.
Definite article; dative singular feminine, agreeing with 'Nähe' as object of 'in'.
Feminine noun; dative singular with 'in' to express static location ('in der Nähe' = nearby).

sentences.target: Wir besuchen die Großeltern am Sonntag.

translations.de: Wir besuchen die Großeltern am Sonntag.
translations.en: We visit the grandparents on Sunday.
translations.es: Visitamos a los abuelos el domingo.
translations.fr: On rend visite aux grands-parents dimanche.
translations.it: Domenica andiamo a trovare i nonni.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们星期天去看爷爷奶奶。
translations.yue: 我哋星期日去探阿嫲同阿爺。
translations.ru: Мы навещаем бабушку и дедушку в воскресенье.
translations.he: אנחנו מבקרים את סבא וסבתא ביום ראשון.
translations.tr: Pazar günü büyükannemi ve büyükbabamı ziyaret ediyorız.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thăm ông bà vào Chủ nhật.
translations.nl: We bezoeken de grootouders op zondag.
translations.uk: Ми відвідуємо дідуся і бабусю в неділю.
translations.hi: हम रविवार को दादा-दादी से मिलने जाते हैं.
translations.id: Kami mengunjungi kakek dan nenek pada hari Minggu.
translations.sv: Vi besöker mor- och farföräldrarna på söndag.
translations.ja: 日曜日に祖父母の家へ行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb; finite present, 1st person plural agreeing with 'Wir'; transitive, selects an accusative object.
Definite article; accusative plural marking 'Großeltern' as direct object.
Plural common noun; accusative plural as the direct object of 'besuchen'.
Contraction of 'an dem'; functions as a preposition governing dative; introduces temporal PP ('on Sunday').
Weekday name; dative singular as the complement of 'am'; temporal adverbial.

sentences.target: Die Kinder spielen bei den Großeltern.

translations.de: Die Kinder spielen bei den Großeltern.
translations.en: The children play at the grandparents'.
translations.es: Los niños juegan en casa de los abuelos.
translations.fr: Les enfants jouent chez les grands-parents.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在爷爷奶奶家玩。
translations.yue: 小朋友喺阿嫲同阿爺屋企玩。
translations.ru: Дети играют у бабушки и дедушки.
translations.pt: As crianças brincam na casa dos avós.
translations.tr: Çocuklar büyükannenin ve büyükbabanın evinde oynuyor.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ chơi ở nhà ông bà.
translations.ar: الأطفال يلعبون في بيت الجدّي والجدّة.
translations.nl: De kinderen spelen bij de grootouders.
translations.uk: Діти граються у дідуся й бабусі.
translations.hi: बच्चे दादा-दादी के घर खेलते हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά παίζουν στο σπίτι των παππούδων.
translations.id: Anak-anak bermain di rumah kakek dan nenek.
translations.sv: Barnen leker hos mor- och farföräldrarna.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは祖父母の家で遊びます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural, marking 'Kinder' as the subject.
Plural common noun; nominative plural subject.
Main verb; finite present, 3rd person plural; intransitive.
Preposition selecting dative; indicates location 'at/with' someone.
Definite article; dative plural, agreeing with 'Großeltern' as complement of 'bei'.
Plural common noun; dative plural object of the preposition 'bei'.

sentences.target: Oma und Opa sind meine Großeltern.

translations.de: Oma und Opa sind meine Großeltern.
translations.en: Grandma and Grandpa are my grandparents.
translations.es: La abuela y el abuelo son mis abuelos.
translations.fr: Mamie et Papi sont mes grands-parents.
translations.it: La nonna e il nonno sono i miei nonni.
translations.zh-Hans: 爷爷和奶奶是我的祖父母。
translations.yue: 阿嫲同阿爺係我嘅祖父母。
translations.ru: Бабушка и дедушка — мои бабушка и дедушка.
translations.pt: Vovó e Vovô são meus avós.
translations.tr: Büyükanne ve büyükbaba benim büyükannem ve büyükbabamdır.
translations.vi: Ông và bà là ông bà của tôi.
translations.nl: Oma en opa zijn mijn grootouders.
translations.uk: Бабуся і дідусь — мої бабуся й дідусь.
translations.hu: A nagymama és a nagypapa az én nagyszüleim.
translations.hi: दादी और दादा मेरे दादा-दादी हैं.
translations.pl: Babcia i dziadek to moi dziadkowie.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά και ο παππούς είναι οι παππούδες μου.
translations.nb: Bestemor og bestefar er mine besteforeldre.
translations.id: Nenek dan kakek adalah kakek-nenek saya.
translations.sv: Mormor och morfar är mina morföräldrar.
translations.ro: Bunica și bunicul sunt bunicii mei.
translations.cs: Babička a dědeček jsou moji prarodiče.
translations.da: Mormor og morfar er mine bedsteforældre.
translations.ja: おばあちゃんとおじいちゃんは私の祖父母です。

tokens.explanation: Common kinship noun; nominative singular; part of a coordinated subject.
Coordinating conjunction linking 'Oma' and 'Opa' into a plural subject.
Common kinship noun; nominative singular; part of a coordinated subject.
Copular auxiliary; finite present, 3rd person plural agreeing with the coordinated subject; links to the nominal predicate.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Großeltern'; nominative plural (predicate nominal), marks ownership by 1st person singular.
Plural common noun; predicate nominative linked by copula 'sind'.
